name: TC_NFR5_DeleteUser_SoftDelete
description: Verify that the soft-delete operation via PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} satisfies defined performance NFRs under a concurrent load of 50 users performing simultaneous account deactivations.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in 'active' status.
Authorization token is required for each request.
Users must not have pending transactions that block deletion.

metrics.target_value: Deactivated users must not appear in GET /users/active

notes: Post-execution: verify that deactivated users do NOT appear in GET /users/active. Ensure all JMeter threads share the same bearer token or each thread obtains its own valid token before sending the PATCH request.
